reviewed_items.reviewer_notes: DISPUTED at Gate 6 (Scope Check). The finding correctly identifies missing epoch range validation in dataColumnSidecarsByRange.ts:134, confirmed by TODO comment. However, BUG_BOUNTY_SCOPE.json explicitly excludes 'All TODO/FIXME/BUG/HACK and similar items referenced in any of the codebases' from scope. This is a known issue pattern - identical TODOs exist in beaconBlocksByRange.ts:85 and blobSidecarsByRange.ts:104, indicating this is a systemic, acknowledged limitation. The parallel byRoot handler (dataColumnSidecarsByRoot.ts:18-23) implements the required MIN_EPOCHS_FOR_DATA_COLUMN_SIDECARS_REQUESTS check. 01e reference: outputs/01e_PARTIAL_W2B3_1771748669.json lines 516-532, property text: 'data_column_sidecars_by_range must reject requests outside data_column_serve_range', assertion: 'forall req: req.range outside serve_range => response == ResourceUnavailable'.
reviewed_items.spec_reference: data_column_sidecars_by_range must reject requests outside data_column_serve_range. Assertion: forall req: req.range outside serve_range => response == ResourceUnavailable
